text: Science has a clearer story about El Nino than social media does. El Nino is a complex climate pattern that affects weather worldwide. It involves warmer ocean temperatures in the Pacific, altering wind patterns. This can lead to heavier rains in some areas and droughts in others. Understanding El Nino helps us prepare for its unpredictable effects. Want to learn more about climate science? Follow for more insights!
